prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次为26246→46667→34627→31790→164548，2025年出现严重断档（位次骤降至16万+），主专业组实际位次约48973，断档幅度超10万名，属异常波动；2021–2025年理科/物理类计划数分别为100→104→99→109→110人，2026年计划106人，较2025年缩招4人（-3.6%），小幅缩招对竞争有微弱加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年第120名，近年排名稳定在116–122名区间，属中游211层次；该校在声誉文件中2021–2026年均未被收录，无显著负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第95位，评价为“一般”，曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档记录，2025年广西断档属首次；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电子信息/通信等专业持续高热推荐，食品科学与工程类热度平稳；广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，按近年比例估算物理类约26.4万人，较2025年物理类26.0万人增加约1.5%，竞争略有加剧；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距广西较远，地域偏好对广西考生报考意愿影响偏中性；该校在广西招生规模约106–110人，占比较小，跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年断档异常后的强烈回弹预期、2026年小幅缩招及广西考生人数微增，预计2026年位次将较2025年断档值大幅回升，但受缩招和考生增加制约无法回到正常位次区间；预测最低位次约144863名，区间144363–145363名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 26246 → 46667 → 34627 → 31790 → 164548 respectively. In 2025, a severe ranking gap occurred (ranking plummeted to 160,000+), with the actual ranking of the main major group around 48973, a gap exceeding 100,000 places, indicating abnormal fluctuation. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Science/Physics Category were 100 → 104 → 99 → 109 → 110 respectively. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 106, a reduction of 4 students (-3.6%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it ranks 120th, with a stable ranking range of 116–122 in recent years, placing it at the mid-tier 211 level. The university has not been included in reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, with no significant negative public opinion. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 95th, rated as 'average', with exposure at a moderately low level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention. There are no records of ranking gaps in historical admission anomalies; the 2025 gap in Guangxi is the first occurrence. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in the enrollment plan, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended, while Food Science and Engineering remains stable in popularity. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Guangxi is approximately 392,000, with an estimated 264,000 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 1.5% compared to 260,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Guangxi, and regional preference has a neutral impact on Guangxi students' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment scale in Guangxi is about 106–110 students, a relatively small proportion, with a stable cross-provincial competition pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound expectation after the abnormal ranking gap in 2025, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026, and the slight increase in Guangxi examinees, the 2026 ranking is expected to rebound significantly from the 2025 gap value, but constrained by the enrollment reduction and increased examinees, it cannot return to the normal ranking range. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 144,863, with a range of 144,363–145,363.

- Computer Science and Technology
- Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Food Science and Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Animal Production (Animal Science, Grassland Science, Aquaculture)
- Plant Production (Horticulture, Facility Agriculture Science and Engineering)
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Water Resources Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking range for 2026 is approximately 144,363–145,363. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice within this range, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range, prioritize competitive majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. When the ranking is close to the upper bound, prioritize majors with distinctive advantages such as Food Science and Engineering (A- discipline) or Veterinary Medicine to increase admission probability.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学类热度推荐但分化明显，金融/财经/经济类分化观望，师范/教育类分化观望；广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，按近年比例估算历史类约12.8万人，较2025年历史类11.9万人增加约7.6%，竞争加剧；东北农业大学位于黑龙江哈尔滨，距广西较远，地域偏好对广西文科考生报考意愿影响偏中性；该校在广西文科招生规模约21–25人，占比较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+19%）对竞争的缓解作用、以及广西历史类考生增加（+7.6%）带来的竞争加剧，扩招效应略强于考生增加效应，预计位次在2025年6438名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约7224名，区间6724–7724名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 4968 → 5000 → 6351 → 5101 → 6438, showing a fluctuating and then backward trend. In the past 3 years, it moved backward from 5101 to 6438, a cumulative backward shift of about 1337 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 6438. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for liberal arts/history category were 15 → 16 → 21 → 16 → 21, with a planned 25 students in 2026, an increase of 4 students (+19%) compared to 2025. This significant expansion will notably alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it ranks 120th, with stable rankings in recent years, placing it in the mid-tier 211 level. The university is not included in the reputation file, with no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin heat evaluation is 'average', with below-average exposure, showing no abnormal increase in application interest. Food Science and Engineering (A-) is its only A- or above discipline. The liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Finance and Economics, Business Administration, Administrative Management, Chinese International Education, etc.) are not directly related to this discipline, so the advantage discipline has limited impact on liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Law is recommended but with clear differentiation; Finance/Economics is differentiated and wait-and-see; Education is differentiated and wait-and-see. The total number of Guangxi general college entrance examination students in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated 128,000 history category students based on recent proportions, an increase of about 7.6% compared to 2025's 119,000 history category students, intensifying competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, far from Guangxi, so geographical preference has a neutral impact on Guangxi liberal arts students' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment scale in Guangxi liberal arts is about 21–25 students, a relatively small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the alleviation of competition from the significant expansion in 2026 (+19%), and the intensified competition from the increase in Guangxi history category students (+7.6%), the expansion effect slightly outweighs the student increase effect. It is expected that the ranking will slightly move backward from the 2025 baseline of 6438. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7224, with a range of 6724–7724.
